ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records in the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, data scientist) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the data point by the clustering algorithm */,
  "cluster_index" INTEGER /* Index of the cluster the data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the clustering model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the clustering model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clustering model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the clustering model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for clustering */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering model applied */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the clustering was run */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric of the clustering result */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to run the model */,
  "num_clusters" INTEGER /* Number of clusters formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model recommendation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset for which the recommendation is made */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended clustering model */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_recommendations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_recommendations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering result used for the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., scatter plot, histogram) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the visualization can be accessed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES model_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The actual API key string */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the API key */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API usage event */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key used for the event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the API request */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the API usage */,
  "requests" INTEGER /* Number of requests made */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the API requests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the document was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the author of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
